# Copilot Instructions

Read `../AGENTS.md` first. Copilot CLI's documented instruction sources include this file and `AGENTS.md`; this file is the compatibility bridge to the repo's scoped `.claude/rules/*` instruction system.

Do not duplicate rule content here. If a durable instruction is missing, add it to the smallest scoped `AGENTS.md` file or `.claude/rules/*` file and keep this file as a compatibility pointer. Use `/instructions` or the active environment to confirm which instruction files the current Copilot client loaded.
